tools.notes: Adopted deliberately at a 2-engineer, 1-designer team size to avoid a later forced migration.

evidence.quote: Putting Kubernetes in place when you only have two engineers and one designer on the project sounds like bad prioritization... It was more work to do upfront, but it means we won't have to migrate.
